mcqs.question: The Need matrix in Banker's algorithm is calculated as:
mcqs.explanation: Need represents remaining resources a process may need: Need[i] = Max[i] - Allocation[i]

mcqs.question: A state is safe if:

options.text: A safe sequence exists to complete all processes

mcqs.explanation: Safe state means there exists at least one sequence in which all processes can complete without deadlock.

mcqs.question: If a process requests more than its declared maximum:

options.text: Error condition - process has exceeded claim

mcqs.explanation: Requesting more than declared maximum is an error. The algorithm assumes processes don't exceed their Max claims.

mcqs.question: Time complexity of the safety algorithm is:
mcqs.explanation: Safety algorithm: O(m × n²) where m = resource types, n = processes. Each of n iterations scans n processes, checking m resources each.
